_comment: Canonical priority order for the section surfaced as a 'briefing' card on /briefings. Each signal MUST contain at least one detail-section whose id appears here, otherwise the picker has no operationally-actionable section to surface (validated by scripts/validate-data.mjs). Shared between src/utils/briefings.ts (UI picker) and scripts/validate-data.mjs (data validator). Order is most-EMS-specific → most-generic: EMS-targeted sections first, operational/clinical/IPC fallbacks last.
